mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id, u.user_nm, u.dept_code, u.admin_yn, u.use_yn, COALESCE(d.dept_name, '') AS dept_name, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ur.role_cd ORDER BY ur.role_cd SEPARATOR ',') FROM tb_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = u.user_id) AS role_cds FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_dept d ON u.dept_code = d.dept_code
AND (u.user_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.user_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND u.use_yn = #{use_yn}
ORDER BY u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (user_id, user_pw, user_nm, dept_code, dept_name, admin_yn, use_yn) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{user_pw}, #{user_nm}, #{dept_code}, (SELECT dept_name FROM tb_dept WHERE dept_code = #{dept_code}), #{admin_yn}, #{use_yn})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET user_nm = #{user_nm}, dept_code = #{dept_code}, dept_name = (SELECT dept_name FROM tb_dept WHERE dept_code = #{dept_code}), admin_yn = #{admin_yn}, use_yn = #{use_yn} WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
UPDATE tb_user SET user_pw = #{user_pw} WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.select: SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_cd, r.role_nm FROM tb_user_role ur JOIN tb_role r ON ur.role_cd = r.role_cd WHERE ur.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY ur.role_cd
SELECT role_cd, role_nm, description, use_yn FROM tb_role ORDER BY role_cd
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_role (role_cd, role_nm, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{role_cd}, #{role_nm}, #{description}, #{use_yn}, 'admin', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.menu_id, m.menu_nm, m.pgm_id, COALESCE(rm.srch_yn, 'N') AS srch_yn, COALESCE(rm.new_yn, 'N') AS new_yn, COALESCE(rm.save_yn, 'N') AS save_yn, COALESCE(rm.del_yn, 'N') AS del_yn, COALESCE(rm.prnt_yn, 'N') AS prnt_yn, COALESCE(rm.upld_yn, 'N') AS upld_yn, COALESCE(rm.init_yn, 'N') AS init_yn FROM tb_menu m LEFT JOIN tb_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id AND rm.role_cd = #{role_cd} WHERE m.menu_type = 'P' AND m.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY m.sort_order
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_role_menu WHERE role_cd = #{role_cd} AND menu_id = #{menu_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_role_menu (role_cd, menu_id, srch_yn, new_yn, save_yn, del_yn, prnt_yn, upld_yn, init_yn) VALUES (#{role_cd}, #{menu_id}, #{srch_yn}, #{new_yn}, #{save_yn}, #{del_yn}, #{prnt_yn}, #{upld_yn}, #{init_yn})
mapper.select: SELECT m.menu_id, m.menu_nm, m.parent_id, m.menu_type, m.pgm_id, m.url, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.use_yn, COALESCE(p.menu_nm, '') AS parent_nm FROM tb_menu m LEFT JOIN tb_menu p ON m.parent_id = p.menu_id ORDER BY m.sort_order, m.menu_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_menu (menu_id, menu_nm, parent_id, menu_type, pgm_id, url, icon, sort_order, use_yn) VALUES (#{menu_id}, #{menu_nm}, #{parent_id}, #{menu_type}, #{pgm_id}, #{url}, #{icon}, #{sort_order}, #{use_yn})
mapper.select:
SELECT pgm_id, pgm_nm, srch_yn, new_yn, save_yn, del_yn, prnt_yn, upld_yn, init_yn, etc_desc1, etc_desc2, etc_desc3, etc_desc4, etc_desc5 FROM tb_pgm_info
AND (pgm_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR pgm_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY pgm_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pgm_info (pgm_id, pgm_nm, srch_yn, new_yn, save_yn, del_yn, prnt_yn, upld_yn, init_yn, etc_desc1, etc_desc2, etc_desc3, etc_desc4, etc_desc5) VALUES (#{pgm_id}, #{pgm_nm}, #{srch_yn}, #{new_yn}, #{save_yn}, #{del_yn}, #{prnt_yn}, #{upld_yn}, #{init_yn}, #{etc_desc1}, #{etc_desc2}, #{etc_desc3}, #{etc_desc4}, #{etc_desc5})
mapper.select: SELECT dept_code, dept_name, parent_code, dept_level FROM tb_dept WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, dept_code
